title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at KFC India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at KFC India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, KFC India Global Group in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About KFC India Global Group:
KFC India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KFC India Global Group!
